title: Isla's New Friend
synopsis: When Isla moves to a new neighborhood, she feels nervous about making friends at the playground. With her mom's gentle encouragement, Isla discovers that friendship begins with a simple hello and finds joy in sharing and playing together with a new friend named Sam.

pages.text: Isla looked out the window of her new house. Everything was different here. The trees were taller. The houses were a different color. Even the mailbox looked strange.

illustration.description: A girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes looking out a window at a new neighborhood with tall trees and colorful houses in bright primary colors with lots of white space
illustration.alt: Isla looking out her new house window at the neighborhood

pages.text: "I miss our old house," Isla said to her mom. "I miss my old room. I miss playing in our old backyard." Mom sat down next to Isla and gave her a big hug.

illustration.description: A girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes sitting with her mom on moving boxes, getting a warm hug in a bright sunny room with primary colors and white space
illustration.alt: Isla and her mom hugging surrounded by moving boxes

pages.text: "I know it feels scary to be somewhere new," Mom said. "But new places can bring wonderful surprises. Would you like to explore the neighborhood with me?" Isla nodded, but she still felt butterflies in her tummy.

illustration.description: A girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes holding her mom's hand at the front door, looking curious but nervous with bright primary colors and joyful energetic style
illustration.alt: Isla and her mom at the front door ready to explore

pages.text: As they walked down the street, Isla heard happy sounds. Laughter and shouting came from around the corner. "What's that noise?" she asked. "Let's go see!" said Mom.

illustration.description: A girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes walking with her mom on a sunny street with bright primary colors, white space, and joyful energetic atmosphere as they approach sounds of children playing
illustration.alt: Isla and her mom walking toward playground sounds

pages.text: They turned the corner and saw the biggest playground Isla had ever seen! There were swings that went super high. There were slides that twisted and turned. There was a sandbox as big as her old bedroom.

illustration.description: A magnificent playground with swings, slides, and sandbox where diverse kids are playing, with a girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes looking amazed in the foreground, bright sunny playground scene with primary colors and white space
illustration.alt: Isla amazed by the large playground with diverse children playing

pages.text: But Isla felt shy when she saw all the children playing. They were running and laughing together. They seemed to know each other so well. "What if they don't want to play with me?" Isla whispered.

illustration.description: A girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes looking shy and hesitant while diverse kids play joyfully in the background on swings and slides, bright sunny playground with primary colors and inclusive atmosphere
illustration.alt: Isla feeling shy while watching other children play

pages.text: Mom squeezed Isla's hand. "Making friends starts with just saying hello," she said. "You don't have to be brave all at once. Just one small step." Isla took a deep breath.

illustration.description: A girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes holding her mom's hand for encouragement near the playground with diverse kids playing on swings and slides in bright primary colors with white space and joyful energetic style
illustration.alt: Isla's mom encouraging her to make friends

pages.text: A kid with curly hair was building something in the sandbox. The sand castle looked amazing, with towers and walls. Isla walked closer to see. "Wow," she said. "That's really cool!"

illustration.description: A girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes approaching a diverse child with curly hair building an elaborate sand castle in a bright sunny playground sandbox with primary colors and white space
illustration.alt: Isla admiring another child's sand castle

pages.text: The kid looked up and smiled. "Thanks! I'm Sam. I'm trying to make it tall, but it keeps falling down. Do you want to help me?" Isla smiled back. "Yes! I'm Isla. I just moved here."

illustration.description: A girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes talking with a diverse child named Sam in the sandbox, both smiling as they work on the sand castle together in a bright sunny playground with primary colors and friendship activities
illustration.alt: Isla and Sam meeting and working together on the sand castle

pages.text: Isla and Sam worked together on the sand castle. When one tower fell down, they built it again. When they needed more water, they took turns carrying the bucket. Working together made everything more fun.

illustration.description: A girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes and diverse friend Sam building a sand castle together, taking turns with a water bucket in a bright sunny playground sandbox with primary colors, white space, and joyful energetic friendship activities
illustration.alt: Isla and Sam working together building their sand castle

pages.text: "Want to go on the swings?" Sam asked. They ran to the swing set together. Isla had never swung so high! Sam showed her how to pump her legs to go even higher. They laughed as they swung back and forth.

illustration.description: A girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes swinging high on playground swings next to diverse friend Sam, both laughing with joy in a bright sunny playground with primary colors, white space, and laughter-filled friendship activities
illustration.alt: Isla and Sam swinging together and laughing

pages.text: As the sun began to set, Mom called, "Time to go home, Isla!" Sam waved goodbye. "Will you come back tomorrow?" Sam asked. "Yes!" said Isla. "We can finish our castle!" She couldn't wait to play again.

illustration.description: A girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes waving goodbye to diverse friend Sam at the playground with her mom in the background, bright sunny playground scene with primary colors, white space, and joyful energetic inclusive atmosphere
illustration.alt: Isla waving goodbye to Sam with her mom calling

pages.text: That night, Isla helped Mom unpack her toys in her new room. "How was the playground?" Mom asked. "I made a friend!" Isla said happily. "Sam is really nice. We built a castle and went on the swings. Tomorrow we're going to play again!" Isla fell asleep with a big smile, excited for tomorrow.

illustration.description: A girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes unpacking toys with her mom in a bright new bedroom, smiling happily while telling about her new friend, with primary colors, white space, and joyful energetic family atmosphere
illustration.alt: Isla happily unpacking and telling her mom about her new friend

metadata.illustrationStyle: bright sunny playground, diverse kids playing, primary colors, white space, joyful energetic, inclusive, park swings slides, laughter, friendship activities

questions.question: How does Isla feel about moving to a new house?
choices: She loves the new house right away
questions.explanation: Isla tells her mom that she misses her old house, her old room, and playing in her old backyard.

questions.question: What does Isla's mom say about making friends?
choices: It starts with just saying hello
You need to wait for others to talk first
questions.explanation: Mom tells Isla that making friends starts with just saying hello and taking one small step.

questions.question: What is Sam doing when Isla first sees them?
questions.explanation: Sam is in the sandbox building an amazing sand castle with towers and walls when Isla first approaches.

questions.question: How do Isla and Sam work together?
choices: They take turns and help each other
questions.explanation: Isla and Sam take turns carrying the water bucket and rebuild towers together when they fall down.

questions.question: How does Isla feel at the end of the story?
choices: Happy and excited to play again
questions.explanation: Isla falls asleep with a big smile, excited for tomorrow when she can play with Sam again.
